programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Jill and Mel hire a contractor who promises a second storey addition in 10 weeks for $125,000 and learn the hard way that a professional-looking contract doesn't equal professional work.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.sub-title: Investment Gate: A Couple Is Conned out of $300,000 and They Are Left With a Destroyed Basement
programme.desc: A couple are one of over 40 families that have fallen victim to an elaborate $15 million fraud.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: An overworked nurse faces innumerable problems when she moves herself and her children into a small home.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Mike inspects Ryan and Eunice's new home after they discover many problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Discovering the gaps in a home-inspection report that lulled Jennifer and Paul into a false sense of security Mike's team gives this couple a second opinion and get to work making their downtown character home as safe and sound as it looks.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Andrew and Melissa's house purchase was supposed to bring security and comfort to their expanding family Mike outlines some home inspection misses and signs of neglect that Damon and the crew will make right and watertight.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: A couple closed a deal before they could read their home inspection report.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: A policewoman on disability downsized to a townhouse she could afford for herself and her daughter.
